        🏆 LMSYS Arena Rankings - March 2026

            Key Insights from 6M+ User Votes
            
                GPT-5.4 just released: March 5 with native computer use
                February was huge: Claude 4.6 series, Gemini 3.1, GPT-5.3
                Context wars: 1M tokens now standard for flagship models
                Mid-tier surprise: Sonnet 4.6 nearly matches Opus at 20% cost
            
        

        
            Real users, blind testing, head-to-head battles

slide5.content:
5 / 11
        Research-Specific Benchmarks

        
            For Our Workshop Tasks
            Focus on reasoning, analysis, and knowledge synthesis - not coding performance
        

        
            
                📚 MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding)
                Tests: Knowledge across 57 academic subjects
                Relevant for: Domain expertise, factual accuracy
                Key insight: Gemini 3.1 Pro: 94.3%, Claude Opus 4.6: 91.2%
            

            
                🧩 HellaSwag
                Tests: Commonsense reasoning completion
                Relevant for: Understanding context, logical inference
                Key insight: Important for text analysis tasks
            

            
                📖 Reading Comprehension (QuAC, CoQA)
                Tests: Understanding and answering from long texts
                Relevant for: Paper analysis, document processing
                Key insight: Critical for Ottoman Bank-style research
            

            
                🔍 TruthfulQA
                Tests: Avoiding false claims, misinformation
                Relevant for: Fact-checking, citation verification
                Key insight: Essential for research integrity
            
        

        
            Skip coding benchmarks like HumanEval - irrelevant for our research tasks

slide6.content:
5 / 11
        Current Model Landscape (March 2026)

        
            🥇 Tier 1: Research Leaders
            
                GPT-5.4 - Latest flagship (March 5), unified general + coding model
                Claude Opus 4.6 - 1M context, 80.8% SWE-bench (Feb 2026)
                Gemini 3.1 Pro - 77.1% ARC-AGI-2, 94.3% GPQA Diamond (Feb 19)
                Claude Sonnet 4.6 - 79.6% SWE-bench at 1/5 Opus price (Feb 2026)
            
        

        
            🥈 Tier 2: Specialized Excellence
            
                GPT-5.3 Codex - Specialized coding, 77.3% Terminal-Bench (Feb 5)
                GPT-5.2 - Previous flagship, still strong for general tasks
                Gemini 3 Pro - Solid all-rounder, good ecosystem integration
            
        

        
            ⚠️ Now Outdated for Research
            
                Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Superseded by Opus/Sonnet 4.6 series
                GPT-4o/4o-mini - Replaced by GPT-5.x series
                Gemini 1.5 Pro - Upgraded to Gemini 3.x series
            
        

        
            ⚡ February 2026 saw major releases - all flagship models refreshed!
